title: UFO Whistleblower David Grusch Isn't Lying: My Top 3 Reasons Why

transcript.text: this is my friend and 14-year
intelligence officer David grush he
testified before Congress over the
summer about the existence of UFO
reverse engineering programs hidden
inside our government having known him
very well for 2 years here are the top
three reasons I think he's telling the
truth number one he brought 40 other
people who handled UFO material directly
to the Inspector General and the
Inspector General labeled his complaint
urgent and credible number two on Jo
Rogan he called out locked Martin Direct
directly as one of the contractors in
possession of UFO material and after
gush's hearing locked Martin didn't even
deny possession of UFOs instead they
said questions about uaps or UFOs are
best handled by the government number
three grush is claiming that Robert J
Oppenheimer set up UFO secrecy protocols
in the ' 50s to be protected by the same
protocols that hide American nuclear
secrets there is a ton of open-source
research that corroborates this
